posts.author: LindaFuchsUTN (Linda Fuchs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

Here at our office we have a TV screen with a ‘viewer’ profile to display dashboards made in Monday. We are currently working on setting up a workflow for a ‘new leads’ process, which includes a dashboard which shows any new leads from the past 2 weeks, and a Llama Farm with Llama’s in different colours, depending on how old the lead is and if we followed up on it. And the Llama Farm provides very clear view of any new leads at a glance.

The dashboard and Llama Farm works on any of our member / admin accounts, just not on the viewer account. Is this intended? Or is there a setting I am missing? or perhaps a bug?

Any help is appreciated
